message:
feat(mermaid): promote 6 diagram family pipeline stages and add CI completion gates

Update DIAGRAM_FAMILY_REGISTRY: Sequence fully Done through snapshots;
State/Gantt/Class/Mindmap/Pie fixtures+snapshots promoted to Done. Add
inline stage labels for readability.

Add 6 CI gate tests (bd-hudcn.1.6) that enforce registry completeness:
all DiagramType variants registered, no families at Unsupported, Supported
families have complete pipelines, fixture/snapshot files match registry
metadata bidirectionally.

Sync beads issue tracker with progress notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
